name: PollIntervall_Trigger
description: Trigger for interval-based polling. b0=Deactivated, b1=Cyclic, b2=On data change.

name: PollIntervall_ms
description: Polling interval in milliseconds. Valid range 500–1200.

name: Grid_Frequency
description: Current grid frequency in Hz. Raw 5000 = 50.00 Hz.

name: Grid_Amperage_1
description: Current in phase L1 (A). High word at 10011, low word at 10012.

name: Grid_Amperage_2
description: Current in phase L2 (A). High word at 10013, low word at 10014.

name: Grid_Amperage_3
description: Current in phase L3 (A). High word at 10015, low word at 10016.

name: Grid_Voltage_1
description: Grid voltage phase L1 (V). High word at 10017, low word at 10018.

name: Grid_Voltage_2
description: Grid voltage phase L2 (V). High word at 10019, low word at 10020.

name: Grid_Voltage_3
description: Grid voltage phase L3 (V). High word at 10021, low word at 10022.

name: Grid_FeedIn_ActivePower_P_Total
description: Total active feed-in power P in kW.

name: Grid_FeedIn_ActivePower_P_1
description: Active feed-in power phase L1 in kW.

name: Grid_FeedIn_ActivePower_P_2
description: Active feed-in power phase L2 in kW.

name: Grid_FeedIn_ActivePower_P_3
description: Active feed-in power phase L3 in kW.

name: Grid_FeedIn_ReactivePower_Q_Total
description: Total reactive feed-in power Q in kVar.

name: Grid_FeedIn_ReactivePower_Q_1
description: Reactive feed-in power phase L1 in kVar.

name: Grid_FeedIn_ReactivePower_Q_2
description: Reactive feed-in power phase L2 in kVar.

name: Grid_FeedIn_ReactivePower_Q_3
description: Reactive feed-in power phase L3 in kVar.

name: Grid_FeedIn_ApparentPower_S_Total
description: Total apparent feed-in power S in kVA (derived: sqrt(P²+Q²)).

name: Grid_FeedIn_ApparentPower_S_1
description: Apparent feed-in power phase L1 in kVA.

name: Grid_FeedIn_ApparentPower_S_2
description: Apparent feed-in power phase L2 in kVA.

name: Grid_FeedIn_ApparentPower_S_3
description: Apparent feed-in power phase L3 in kVA.

name: System_ActivePower_P
description: Current active power in kW. High word at 10050, low word at 10051.

name: System_ReactivePower_Q
description: Current reactive power in kVar. High word at 10051, low word at 10052.

name: System_ApparentPower_S
description: Current apparent power in kVA (derived: sqrt(P²+Q²)). High word at 10052, low word at 10053.

name: System_ReactivePower_Q_Available
description: Theoretically available maximum reactive power in kVar.

name: System_ActivePower_P_Available
description: Theoretically available maximum active power in kW.

name: System_CosPhi
description: Current CosPhi. Engineering 0.95 → raw 950 (stored as integer × 1000, factor 0.001).

name: System_StateOfCharge_MAX_Wh
description: Nominal storage energy capacity in Wh.

name: System_StateOfCharge_Available_Wh
description: Current available energy capacity in Wh.

name: System_StateOfCharge_Available_percent
description: Current available energy capacity in percent.

name: System_StateOfCharge_Unused_Wh
description: Current unused energy capacity in Wh.

name: System_StateOfCharge_Unused_percent
description: Current unused energy capacity in percent.

name: ReactivePower_SetPoint_QU_ON_OFF
description: Q(U) reactive power provision active. 1=ON, 0=OFF. Access is from GGW3 perspective (write).

name: ReactivePower_Feedback_QU_ON_OFF
description: Feedback for Q(U) command active and implemented. Access is from GGW3 perspective (read).

name: ReactivePower_SetPoint_QU_Voltage
description: Reference voltage setpoint for Q(U) in kV.

name: ReactivePower_Feedback_QU_Voltage
description: Feedback for Q(U) reference voltage in kV.

name: ReactivePower_SetPoint_Q_kVar_ON_OFF
description: Reactive power Q setpoint in kVar active. 1=ON, 0=OFF.

name: ReactivePower_Feedback_Q_kVar_ON_OFF
description: Feedback for Q setpoint in kVar active and implemented.

name: ReactivePower_SetPoint_Q_kVar
description: Reactive power Q setpoint in kVar.

name: ReactivePower_Feedback_Q_kVar
description: Feedback for reactive power Q setpoint in kVar.

name: ReactivePower_SetPoint_Q_percent_ON_OFF
description: Reactive power Q setpoint in percent active. 1=ON, 0=OFF.

name: ReactivePower_Feedback_Q_percent_ON_OFF
description: Feedback for Q setpoint in percent active and implemented.

name: ReactivePower_SetPoint_Q_percent
description: Reactive power Q setpoint in percent (0–100).

name: ReactivePower_Feedback_Q_10_percent
description: Feedback for Q setpoint in percent, 10% steps.

name: ReactivePower_Feedback_Q_1_percent
description: Feedback for Q setpoint in percent, 1% steps.

name: CosPhi_SetPoint_ON_OFF
description: CosPhi setpoint active. 1=ON, 0=OFF.

name: CosPhi_Feedback_ON_OFF
description: Feedback for CosPhi setpoint active and implemented.

name: CosPhi_SetPoint
description: CosPhi setpoint. Engineering 0.95 → raw 950 (stored as integer × 1000, factor 0.001).

name: CosPhi_Feedback
description: CosPhi setpoint feedback. Engineering 0.95 → raw 950 (stored as integer × 1000, factor 0.001).

name: ActivePower_SetPoint_P_ON_OFF
description: Active power P setpoint active. 1=ON, 0=OFF.

name: ActivePower_Feedback_P_ON_OFF
description: Feedback for active power P setpoint active and implemented.

name: ActivePower_SetPoint_P_kW
description: Active power P setpoint in kW.

name: ActivePower_Feedback_P_kW
description: Active power P setpoint feedback in kW.

name: ActivePower_SetPoint_P_percent_ON_OFF
description: Active power P setpoint in percent active. 1=ON, 0=OFF.

name: ActivePower_Feedback_P_percent_ON_OFF
description: Feedback for active power P percent setpoint active and implemented.

name: ActivePower_SetPoint_P_percent
description: Active power P setpoint in percent (0–100).

name: ActivePower_Feedback_P_10_percent
description: Feedback for P setpoint in percent, 10% steps.

name: ActivePower_Feedback_P_1_percent
description: Feedback for P setpoint in percent, 1% steps.

name: ControlStage_SetPoint_percent_ON_OFF
description: Control-stage active power limitation active. 1=ON, 0=OFF.

name: ControlStage_Feedback_percent_ON_OFF
description: Feedback for control-stage power limitation active.

name: ControlStage_SetPoint_percent
description: Bitfield control stage. b0=0%, b1=30%, b2=60%, b3=100%.

name: ControlStage_Feedback_percent
description: Bitfield feedback control stage. b0=0%, b1=30%, b2=60%, b3=100%.

name: ControlStage_0_percent_SetPoint_ON_OFF
description: 0% curtailment command active.

name: ControlStage_0_percent_Feedback_ON_OFF
description: 0% curtailment feedback active.

name: ControlStage_30_percent_SetPoint_ON_OFF
description: 30% curtailment command active.

name: ControlStage_30_percent_Feedback_ON_OFF
description: 30% curtailment feedback active.

name: ControlStage_60_percent_SetPoint_ON_OFF
description: 60% curtailment command active.

name: ControlStage_60_percent_Feedback_ON_OFF
description: 60% curtailment feedback active.

name: ControlStage_100_percent_SetPoint_ON_OFF
description: 100% control stage command active.

name: ControlStage_100_percent_Feedback_ON_OFF
description: 100% control stage feedback active.
